# Read the file
path = "/mnt/data/file-4o19pmbXuacP8bEwfcb1JM-text_to_analyse.txt"
with open(path, "rb") as f:
    raw_bytes = f.read()
raw = raw_bytes.decode('utf-8')
print("Length:", len(raw))
print("--- Start of file ---")
print(raw[:1000])
print("--- Middle excerpt ---")
print(raw[1000:2000])
print("--- End excerpt ---")
print(raw[-500:])

raw = open("/mnt/data/file-4o19pmbXuacP8bEwfcb1JM-text_to_analyse.txt", "r", encoding="utf-8").read()
aya = "وَمَن يَتَّقِ اللَّهَ يَجْعَل لَّهُ مَخْرَجًا * وَيَرْزُقْهُ مِنْ حَيْثُ لَا يَحْتَسِبُ"
hadith = "إن الله تعالى يقول: يا ابن آدم، تفرغ لعبادتي أملأ صدرك غنى وأسد فقرك، وإن لا تفعل ملأت يديك شغلاً ولم أسد فقرك"

# Find all occurrences
def find_all(s, sub):
    idxs = []
    start = 0
    while True:
        i = s.find(sub, start)
        if i == -1:
            break
        idxs.append(i)
        start = i+1
    return idxs

aya_idxs = find_all(raw, aya)
hadith_idxs = find_all(raw, hadith)
aya_idxs, hadith_idxs, len(aya_idxs), len(hadith_idxs)

raw = open("/mnt/data/file-4o19pmbXuacP8bEwfcb1JM-text_to_analyse.txt", "r", encoding="utf-8").read()
aya = "وَمَن يَتَّقِ اللَّهَ يَجْعَل لَّهُ مَخْرَجًا * وَيَرْزُقْهُ مِنْ حَيْثُ لَا يَحْتَسِبُ"
hadith = "إن الله تعالى يقول: يا ابن آدم، تفرغ لعبادتي أملأ صدرك غنى وأسد فقرك، وإن لا تفعل ملأت يديك شغلاً ولم أسد فقرك"
aya_idxs = find_all(raw, aya)
hadith_idxs = find_all(raw, hadith)
spans = []
for i in aya_idxs:
    start = i
    end = i + len(aya)
    span_text = raw[start:end]
    assert span_text == aya, (start,end, span_text[:30])
    spans.append({"span_start": start, "span_end": end, "span_text": span_text, "citation_type": "Aya"})
for i in hadith_idxs:
    start = i
    end = i + len(hadith)
    span_text = raw[start:end]
    assert span_text == hadith, (start,end, span_text[:30])
    spans.append({"span_start": start, "span_end": end, "span_text": span_text, "citation_type": "Hadeeth"})
len(spans), spans[:2]
